item.title: Researchers find young Australians ageing faster internally, potentially increasing cancer risk
item.description: Younger adults are increasingly being diagnosed with cancers traditionally associated with older age.

item.title: ICC laws to forbid Indian cricket teenager Vaibhav Sooryavanshi from sharing rooms with teammates during UK tour
item.description: Measures have already been taken for the 15-year-old who will represent India in the T20 internationals.

item.title: Drones set to monitor Sydney’s most popular beaches for sharks
item.description: It comes amid concerns over an increase in shark activity at popular beaches.

item.title: Australian boxer Liam Paro an IBF champion again after history-making fight
item.description: ‘Love me, hate me, you can’t take that from me.’

item.title: Teal MPs launch new centrist political party aimed at ‘unity over division’
item.description: ‘Across the country, Australians want something better.’

item.title: Australia’s Tristan Schoolkate sinks British favourite Dan Evans on sweltering day of Wimbledon qualifying
item.description: A tech issue caused a huge delay ... and it only prolonged the pain for local fans.

item.title: Middle East war: Israel and Lebanon in talks to transfer land occupied during conflict
item.description: Israeli forces have seized a swathe of southern Lebanon in response to Hezbollah strikes.

item.title: Middle East war: Trump shifts blame for disastrous attack on Iranian school
item.description: The strike on the first day of the current conflict killed 175 children.

item.title: Mandy Melham, mother of star jockey Ben Melham, banned from horse racing
item.description: The awkward situation is under investigation and centres around documentation of a horse.

item.title: Channel 7 star Kate McCarthy ‘buoyed’ by AFL community’s ‘overwhelming’ response to online abuse
item.description: The prominent commentator choked back tears as she spoke ‘from the bottom of my heart’.

item.title: The lifeline saving regional mums through a computer and their internet connection
item.description: ‘The reality is, 25 per cent of parents are experiencing symptoms and they just don’t know who to reach out to, where to go, what to do.’

item.title: Emotional Today show hosts fight back tears after announcing Karl Stefanovic’s departure
item.description: ‘Karl has woken up with Today for 21 years so we know this is a huge change for our viewers and of course for us.’

item.title: Ship attacked in Strait of Hormuz after Iranian warning prompting UN to pause maritime escort operation
item.description: The International Maritime Organisation has temporarily suspended an operation to escort ships through the Strait of ‌Hormuz following an attack on a vessel.

item.title: Aussie F1 gun Oscar Piastri spills on bathroom sauna prep for Austrian Grand Prix: ‘Not for pleasure’
item.description: ‘You can cause yourself a lot of pain by doing that.’

item.title: Serena Williams to face young Aussie Maya Joint in Wimbledon return
item.description: The all-time great has been handed a favourable draw for her grand slam comeback.

item.title: Fremantle MP Josh Wilson red-carded for punching an opposition player in the head during soccer game
item.description: The victim says he has asked for a personal apology but is yet to hear back.

item.title: Sydney becoming a ‘buyer’s market’ where houses under $1 million are reappearing
item.description: Houses buyers couldn’t have dreamt of affording a year ago are now within reach.

item.title: Medicare changes delayed after concerns vulnerable Australians could lose easier access to GPs
item.description: Health providers say the proposal risked creating unnecessary hurdles for patients.

item.title: Doctor warns over rising demand for intimate cosmetic surgery
item.description: ‘It’s important for women to understand there’s a huge range of normal.’

item.title: In the red: Europe on high alert as ‘apocalyptic’ heat spreads
item.description: Scientists say the heatwave is the worst ever recorded on the continent.

item.title: US strikes Iran after drone attack on cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz as Trump says Tehran violated ceasefire
item.description: The escalation has renewed fears over global shipping and oil and gas supplies.

item.title: Small aircraft slams into Beijing’s tallest tower sparking major investigation
item.description: Workers on the 108-storey skyscraper had to be evacuated after the crash.

item.title: Recall: 5-in-1 nusery centre portable cot sold at Costway and Amazon pulled from shelves
item.description: A product for babies and toddler has been recalled after it failed to meet Australia’s mandatory safety standards, prompting warnings of a risk or serious injury or death.

item.title: Tax office’s warning as millions of Australians prepare to lodge returns
item.description: Doing this one thing can cause mistakes and lead to big delays.

item.title: Venezuelan earthquake kills more than 900 with thousands more missing or injured
item.description: More than 50,000 people have been reported missing after twin quakes struck.

item.title: Urgent warning as disease carried by cats linked to blindness and pregnancy issues
item.description: Experts estimate a half of the world’s population has come into contact with the parasite.

item.title: India questioned after T20 boilover and bizarre snub of teen sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
item.description: ‘Be ashamed of yourselves ... be very, very ashamed.’

item.title: Maternal Instinct: What is Netflix’s new true crime documentary about?
item.description: The disturbing true story behind the new true crime documentary about American woman Taylor Parker.

item.title: Two tropical storms put Japan on alert, evacuation orders issued for one million people amid landslide fears
item.description: More than 200 flights have been cancelled and train services suspended amid the wait for the approaching weather systems.

item.title: Australian man arrested at Bangkok airport after 17-year-old Thai girl’s body found in suitcase
item.description: The 17-year-old girl was last seen entering an apartment building with the man before she disappeared.

item.title: The Issue Podcast: ‘Never enough’: Greens Senator David Shoebridge slams Australia’s defence spending as wasteful blowout
item.description: ‘It’s like pouring water into a sieve.’

item.title: Paris hasn’t sat in a regular classroom in years. Her mum says she’s never been better
item.description: ‘She’s probably got a better social life than me ... it’s amazing.’

item.title: What if Sydney’s newest suburbs looked different? Architects rethink the brick home
item.description: ‘We need to look at these houses differently in order to make them still functional, attractive, communities where we want to be.’

item.title: New video exposes Vickrum Digwa’s lies that led to British student Henry Nowak's death in handcuffs
item.description: ‘You’ve been stabbed? Whereabouts? I don’t think you have, mate.’

item.title: Brumby cull: Inside the fierce battle to protect or kill Australia’s feral horses
item.description: Helicopter culls, political pressure and clashing worldviews will collide again as one of the nation’s fiercest environmental fights is put back on the table.

item.title: Riverside Christian College’s 2024 dux never went to class. This is how they did it
item.description: Principal Michelle Gouge is the ultimate advocate for her school’s system, saying it bears little resemblance to what many Australians still imagine.

item.title: George Russell takes pole at Austrian GP despite yellow flag controversy as Oscar Piastri banks seventh
item.description: George Russell appeared to ignore stewards’ rulings before an investigation uncovered the truth.

item.description: ‘I’m not sure how I will navigate life.’

item.title: Mourning mother petitions for corrections order overhaul after her son was tragically killed
item.description: His mum holds onto the final three words he yelled out to her from his car as we went to hang out with friends.

item.title: Powerball: Kiosk that sold winning $40m ticket revealed as search continues for new-found multi-millionaire
item.description: Lottery officials have named the outlet that sold the division one winning ticket from Thursday’s mammoth draw as they continue to search for the owner of the slip.

item.title: Anzac Day Test confirmed, Bledisloe Cup to change
item.description: Rugby Australia and New Zealand Rugby have announced that a third Bledisloe Cup Test will be played on Anzac Day in Brisbane next year.

item.title: Sydney Airport lost property and unclaimed Australia Post packages to be auctioned off
item.description: There are thousands of items including a wedding dress, circular saw and an air fryer.

item.description: Experts have sounded the alarm over extreme risks to young users' safety and mental health.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: The online ancestry revolution helping Australians uncover who they really are
item.description: ‘There is so much information available out there, but it’s spread all around the world .. but you really can get taken on a journey about your ancestor.’

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Major highway shut after huge truck fire in horror crash
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Six shot dead at mother-and-child shelter in northern Germany
item.description: Three people have been detained after multiple people were killed in a town in northern Germany.

item.title: Cause of death revealed for The Ring and Lilo & Stitch actor Daveigh Chase
item.description: The former child star passed away earlier this month at the age of 35.

item.title: MG 07 electric and PHEV wagon leaked in China
item.description: The MG 07 EV and plug-in hybrid will be available as a wagon in China, but it's unknown if it will be exported to Australia.

item.title: Death toll jumps again as aftershocks rock Venezuela
item.description: The death toll from the country’s twin earthquakes has jumped to more than 1,700, as a 4.6-magnitude aftershock struck Caracas.

item.title: Family of Argentine footballer Lucas Trejo tragically killed in Venezuela earthquakes
item.description: The veteran defender rushed home to search ‘through the rubble with my hands’ for his wife and kids.

item.title: Hyundai Staria Hybrid can't tow – for now
item.description: Hyundai’s van has a new powertrain, but it doesn’t yet have an official towing rating – though the automaker says this shouldn’t impact sales.

item.title: World Cup rocked by deadly shooting at fan watch zone in at San Pedro Square, California
item.description: One person has been pronounced dead, while another was seen with ‘blood around his neck and upper ⁠back’.

item.title: 2026 MG U9 Black Edition prices: Sinister special joins ute lineup
item.description: Australia is the first country to receive the limited-run U9 Black Edition, which brings unique mechanical upgrades and one-off visual changes.

item.title: Hyundai says Australia's EV sales have turned a corner
item.description: Hyundai Australia sees the current record market share for electric vehicles as the new normal, suggesting the boom in sales has marked a turning point.

item.title: Ben Stokes to watch Ashes from ‘hospitality box’ after series defeat to New Zealand in farewell Test
item.description: The retiring England captain has finished his career on a sour note but insists he is ‘done’.

item.title: China’s oldest car brand is coming to Australia
item.description: Luxury brand Hongqi could be the first marque from China's FAW Group to sell vehicles in Australia, taking on Volvo and Cadillac.

item.title: World No.65 Daria Kasatkina rescues faltering day for Aussies at Wimbledon
item.description: The 29-year-old battled through despite having ‘low expectations’.

item.title: World Cup heavyweights Germany crash out after dramatic shootout against Paraguay
item.description: The four-time champions nearly pulled off a miraculous escape before a horror miss sealed their fate.

item.title: Jordan Lewis responds to historical allegation that AFL failed to act on concussion advice
item.description: ‘I would like to know why they didn’t act on it.’

item.title: ‘Worst it’s been since the great depression’: Why the Australian wine industry is in peril
item.description: Crushing footage has emerged revealing the extent of the crisis in one of Australia’s most famous industries.

item.title: Drivers rush to get cheap petrol before fuel excise relief reduction as watchdog warns servos
item.description: Petrol stations have been put on notice as prices drop to lower than they’ve been since the 2021 pandemic.

item.title: Shaken Jannik Sinner overcomes mid-match injury to beat Miomir Kecmanovic at Wimbledon
item.description: The defending champion was left with a bloodied shoe before prevailing in a five-set epic.

item.title: Amazon sued by ACCC over Prime ad changes allegedly forcing Australians to pay extra for ad-free streaming
item.description: Australia’s consumer watchdog has accused the company of leaving the customers with no choice.

item.title: Chilling revelation as details of two other Thailand suitcase murders come to light amid Simon Carman charges
item.description: Chilling new details have emerged just days after a Perth man allegedly murdered a girl in Thailand and stuffed her body in a suitcase.

item.title: NSW star Mitchell Moses determined to repay faith amid intense criticism
item.description: ‘It doesn’t matter what anyone else thinks.’

item.title: Ethan Midgley accused of shooting murder of partner Mallorie Roberts on Gold Coast
item.description: ‘I’m speechless ... she was too young to go.’

item.title: Ernst & Young staffer allegedly accesses Prime Minister Anthony Albanese’s bank account
item.description: The EY graduate has lost his job and will face court on Tuesday.

item.title: Karl Stefanovic’s ex Cassandra Thorburn in the fight for her life after rare breast cancer diagnosis
item.description: ‘To realise how rare it was, was quite scary and made me feel quite alone.’

item.title: Chris Fagan expects Dayne Zorko to play on in 2027: ‘It’ll be his call’
item.description: Dayne Zorko is the second-oldest active player in the AFL, behind only Scott Pendlebury.

item.title: Miracle escape after horror crash engulfs seven trucks in flames closing Hume Highway
item.description: The blaze was fueled by tonnes of flammable material being transported by the trucks.

item.title: Jeep Australia sticking with Wrangler, new Chinese Bronco rival firming
item.description: Jeep Australia could follow its European counterparts in launching a new large SUV co-developed with Dongfeng, but it will continue to offer the Wrangler.

item.title: Grieving World Cup star Cody Gakpo overcome with emotion after scoring clutch goal following personal tragedy
item.description: The fan favourite burst into tears, two days after going public with heartbreaking news.

item.title: Burns survivor Sophie Delezio announces major new career move
item.description: The Australian hero plans to use her real experience as a new mum to help other parents.

item.title: Newborn baby’s body found in portable toilet at Electric Forest Festival in Michigan, USA
item.description: A worker made the tragic discovery during routine maintenance.

item.title: Melbourne coach Stephen King pours cold water over Bailey Humphrey interest but draft bounty on the table
item.description: A blockbuster deal from last year could unlock the key to a massive move this off-season.

item.title: Damien Hardwick urged to explain ‘unthinkable’ situation surrounding Gold Coast’s misfiring midfield
item.description: The premiership coach is facing mounting pressure as the star-studded midfield continues to falter.

item.title: Shock AFL debutant confirmed as superstar ruled out
item.description: The former rugby league player will get his chance to impress in the AFL.

item.title: West Coast premiership hero Jamie Cripps calls time on AFL career
item.description: ‘My family make me tick and they’re who I do it for.’
